resources.string: Tham gia cửa hàng đã có
Tap to add products, scan barcodes instantly. Optimized interface makes every transaction take just seconds.
Track inventory in real-time, automatic revenue reports. Everything at your fingertips — anytime, anywhere.
Set up in 30 seconds. No IT knowledge needed, no hidden fees. Start selling today!
Account locked. Try again in %1$d minutes
Login as a different staff member
Chọn tài khoản của bạn để tiếp tục
Chưa đặt PIN — đăng nhập trực tiếp
Quay lại đăng nhập bằng PIN
Sync with devices on the same network
No devices found on this network
This device is broadcasting as server
This will merge data from %1$s. Your local data will be updated. Continue?
Password must be at least 6 characters
Are you sure you want to delete?
Account locked. Try again in %1$d minutes
Account locked for 5 minutes after 5 failed attempts
This account has no PIN set. Please contact the store owner.
Only the store owner can perform this action.
No password has been set for this account.
\"%1$s\" only has %2$d %3$s in stock, not enough for %4$d
No Bluetooth devices found.\nPlease pair a printer in Bluetooth settings.
Send receipt as a beautiful PDF file
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"?
Leave blank to keep current / no PIN
This will remove your PIN and let you in immediately. You can set a new PIN in Settings afterwards.
At least 6 characters, for sensitive operations
Join store via P2P will be available in the next version.
Please grant Camera permission to scan barcodes
No printer found.\nPlease pair a Bluetooth printer in Settings.
Bluetooth is not enabled. Please enable Bluetooth and pair a printer.
No Bluetooth devices found. Please pair a printer first.
Please enter product name and selling price
Store code must be 4–8 alphanumeric characters
Are you sure you want to logout?
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Google Drive backup will be available in the next version.
Your data is currently stored safely on this device.
This backup file will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
Replace all data from a backup file
Google Drive restore will be available in the next version.
Please ensure you have backed up your data before restoring.
Warning: Restoring will replace ALL current data. This cannot be undone.

All current data will be replaced with the backup from:

%1$s

This action cannot be undone. Continue?
Chưa có tài khoản nhân viên
Vui lòng vào Cài đặt → Nhân viên để thêm tài khoản
Tự động đăng nhập khi nhập đủ PIN
Easier on the eyes in low-light environments
Set up a PIN to protect your account
Enter your current password then set a new one
Set an owner password for sensitive operations (e.g. reset PIN)
Used for resetting PIN and sensitive operations. Recommended.
Sync data between devices via LAN
New features in the next version
Auto backup to Google Drive, restore when switching devices
Take a photo of an invoice, AI auto-recognizes and imports the order
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"?
Auto return to POS in %1$d seconds…
Press \"Scan More\" to start scanning product barcodes
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"?
Try a different search or period
Create categories to organize your products
No products added yet.\nTap the + button to add products.
You will import %1$d product(s) with total %2$d units into stock.\n\nConfirm purchase?
No variants added yet. Tap \"Add variant\" to create one.
Are you sure you want to delete variant \"%1$s\"?
Select a variant to add to cart
Stock is shared across all variants. Import per-variant to track separately.
Account locked. Try again in %1$d minutes.
Incorrect PIN 5 times. Account locked for 5 minutes.
View stock levels, quick add & adjust inventory
Add products with inventory tracking to see them here
This will immediately add stock and log the change. Use Stock Audit for detailed adjustments or purchase orders for supplier tracking.
Enter the actual counted quantity in the warehouse. The system will automatically calculate differences with software stock.
Enter the quantity to add to stock. Use this for incoming goods that haven\'t been recorded.
Enter the quantity to remove from stock. Use this for damaged, lost, or expired goods.
Search or scan products to add them to the audit
Please add at least one product
No variants yet. Add your first variant.
System will warn when exceeding the limit
Print store logo at receipt header
Play sound on scan or checkout
Applied to products without custom settings
This feature is being developed and will be available in a future update.
Bluetooth printer connection will be available in a future update.\n\nYou can currently share receipts as PDF or images from the order details screen.

Need help or have suggestions?

📧 Email: support@vipos.vn
📱 Hotline: +84.888.3333.58

We'd love to hear from you!

ViPOS v1.0.0

A lightweight, offline-first Point of Sale app designed for small businesses.

© 2026 ViPOS Team
Inventory report details will show stock value, turnover rate, and aging analysis.
Debt report will show outstanding customer debts, payment history, and aging.
Profit report will show gross profit, net profit, margins by product and period.
Excel export will allow you to download reports for accounting and analysis.
No profit data for this period
Tap a product to add it to the cart first
Products will appear on the POS screen
Tap a product and complete an order
